phaseHistory.notes: Solo Time agent draft 1 — 3-component architecture plan (decision router, charter verifier, recurrence detector). Commit cef8ec74.
Solo Time agent draft 2 — built autonomy-engine v1 core (decision.py, charter.py, recurrence.py, engine.py CLI). All 4 test scenarios passed. Commit a3b6a5fd.

teacherReviews.feedback:
Good architecture, clean separation, 18/18 tests pass. One real bug must be fixed:

1. **BUG — warn-gate treated as block (charter.py:64):**  makes warn-gated tenet failures block tasks. Any EXECUTE task with "skip"/"ignore"/"refuse"/"decline" in the title gets DEFERRED with "Charter: unknown" instead of ACTing. Fix: . Add a test: EXECUTE task with "skip" in title should route to ACT, not DEFER.

2. **__pycache__ tracked in git** — 4 .pyc files committed. Add brain/autonomy-engine/__pycache__/ to .gitignore, remove from tracking.

3. **Version string mismatch** — engine.py says v1.1, plan says v1.2. Sync to v1.2.

All 3 revision items verified in code: warn-gate fix correct (charter.py:64), __pycache__ removed from tracking, version synced to v1.2. 23/23 tests pass. Clean separation of concerns, good test coverage including the specific regression test for skip-keyword routing. Ship it.
